trades.reasoning: Score 95 with all four bullish signals — RSI 64.7 sits in the momentum zone with room before overbought, MACD crossover confirmed, price above SMA-20, and volume surge; best use of the remaining cash before slots go idle.

decisions.briefing: Markets were essentially flat today with NASDAQ -0.4% and S&P 500 -0.1%, a quiet, directionless session with no major catalyst in either direction. Cash sits at $477 — just under the $500 preference threshold — so I'm deploying one position in FBIN, the top score-95 name with every bullish signal firing and RSI leaving upside before overbought territory. All six existing positions remain untouched; no stop-loss or profit-target triggers were indicated.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted marginally lower on Wednesday with the NASDAQ slipping 0.4% and the S&P 500 down 0.1%, reflecting a cautious mid-week session as investors found little fresh macro news to act on. Technology stocks bore the brunt of light profit-taking, pulling the NASDAQ modestly below the broader index. With no major earnings or Fed commentary on the calendar, trading volumes stayed subdued and price action remained choppy — a classic summer lull.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週三小幅收跌，納斯達克指數下滑0.4%，標普500指數微跌0.1%，反映投資者在缺乏新鮮宏觀催化劑下採取觀望態度。科技股面臨溫和獲利回吐壓力，令納指跑輸大盤。由於當日無重大財報或聯儲局官員表態，成交量整體偏低，走勢反覆震盪，呈現典型夏季淡市特徵。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that buys stocks showing strong recent price and volume trends, on the theory that assets already moving upward tend to keep rising in the near term. Indicators like RSI in the 55–70 bullish zone, a MACD crossover, and an above-average volume surge all confirm that buyers are in control. Today's top picks — FBIN, FND, ICLR — score highest because multiple momentum signals align at the same time, increasing the probability of continued upward movement.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入近期價格與成交量均呈強勁上升趨勢的股票，其核心邏輯是已在上漲的資產在短期內往往具有延續性。RSI介於55至70的強勢區間、MACD黃金交叉，以及高於均值的成交量放大，均確認買方力量主導市場。今日最高評分候選股——FBIN、FND、ICLR——之所以脫穎而出，正是因為多項動能指標同步共振，大幅提升持續上行的概率。
